overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking and then running along a city sidewalk at dusk. The scene features palm-lined streets, modern office buildings, and commercial storefronts under a purple sunset sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with palm trees and storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past commercial storefronts with yellow awnings

notable_agents.action: woman in pink top standing near the building entrance
man in gray jacket walking past the camera

entered.detail: low-rise commercial building with yellow trim and large concrete planters
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk along the street
modern high-rise building with illuminated windows
black metal park benches along the curb

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a commercial sidewalk at dusk, passing pedestrians near a yellow-trimmed building. Palm trees line the path while a modern glass office tower rises in the background, and street lights begin to illuminate the purple sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with parked vehicles and bike racks

events.description: character transitions from walking to running along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: breaking into a sprint while moving along the street past parked cars

entered.detail: red sports car parked at the curb near bike racks
metal bike parking racks on the sidewalk
single parking meter posts along the curb
building with graffiti mural reading SINNERS and FEARLESS

segments.scene_description: The character accelerates from walking to running along the sidewalk, passing parked vehicles and bike racks. The yellow commercial building falls behind as a building with street art comes into view on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk approaching bus stop with residential buildings

agents.ego_description: sprinting along the sidewalk approaching a bus stop shelter

notable_agents.action: person in green jacket running ahead along the sidewalk

entered.detail: two-story beige apartment building with illuminated windows
glass and metal bus shelter structure with bench
large green trash bins against the building wall

segments.scene_description: Running past the mural building, the character approaches a bus stop shelter along a residential stretch. A pedestrian in a green jacket runs ahead, and the palm trees now line the far side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk at bus stop approaching intersection

agents.ego_description: running past the bus stop and approaching a street intersection with crosswalk

notable_agents.action: woman in black dress standing near trash bins then walking toward street

entered.detail: illuminated advertisement poster for Space Monkey 3D movie on bus shelter
street intersection with white crosswalk markings and traffic

segments.scene_description: The character runs past the bus stop shelter featuring a Space Monkey 3D movie poster, approaching a street intersection. A woman stands near trash bins before walking toward the crosswalk as vehicles pass on the multi-lane road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a city sidewalk at dusk, transitioning from a slow walk past commercial storefronts to a fast run toward a busy street intersection. It begins with the character walking past pedestrians and a yellow-trimmed building, with palm trees and a glass office tower set against a deepening purple sky. As the character accelerates into a run, the yellow building recedes and is replaced by a structure adorned with street art on the left. The scene then shifts toward a more residential stretch, passing a pedestrian in a green jacket and a bus stop shelter featuring a Space Monkey 3D movie poster. Finally, the camera reaches a multi-lane intersection where a woman walks toward a crosswalk as vehicles pass by.
